inputs.text: Mujhe khaansi ho rahi hai, sookhi khaansi

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis

hypotheses.label: Viral fever

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis

inputs.text: Mujhe raat ko pasina aata hai, wazan bhi kam ho raha hai, khaansi ab 2 hafte se zyada ho gayi hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Night sweats, weight loss, and prolonged cough are cardinal signs of tuberculosis

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Although bronchitis can cause cough, the presence of night sweats and weight loss makes it less likely

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: Pneumonia can also present with cough and fever, but the specific combination of symptoms here points more towards tuberculosis

inputs.text: Mujhe bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai, khaansi ke saath kabhi-kabhi khoon bhi aata hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: The presence of blood in sputum and severe weakness confirms the diagnosis of tuberculosis

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the specific symptoms and progression of the disease

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
